subject: Clingo constraint-solver adapter

argv: import json, platform, clingo; print(json.dumps({'python': platform.python_version(), 'clingo': clingo.__version__}, sort_keys=True))

semantic_contract: Blackcell deterministic policy selects evidence and owns freshness, confidence, conflict, unknown, provenance, explanation, proof identity, and authorization semantics
Clingo independently checks each decisive EXISTS, EQUALS, NOT_EQUALS, IN, and NOT_IN predicate result using canonical JSON scalar identities
the adapter returns the exact reference ConstraintEvaluation and proof artifacts when parity holds
any disagreement, malformed mapping, solver error, or non-unique model fails closed with a content-free integrity error
limitations: promotion establishes compatibility and semantic parity, not improved policy quality
Clingo does not receive authority to reinterpret evidence or bypass a deterministic denial
the Repository Operator and DailyOperatorV2Workflow defaults remain deterministic Python policy
